dialogue.speaker: A
dialogue.name: Emma
dialogue.text: Hi, is this Student Services? I'm Emma Lee. I'm calling because I think I may have a problem with my fall registration.

dialogue.speaker: B
dialogue.name: Michael
dialogue.text: Good morning, Emma. This is Michael. I'd be happy to help. What's happening?

questions.question: Why did Emma contact Student Services?

options.B: To solve a registration scheduling problem

answer.correct_answer: To solve a registration scheduling problem
answer.explanation: The entire conversation focuses on course registration difficulties.

questions.question: When did course registration open for first-year students?

answer.explanation: Michael states registration opened on July fifteenth.
